entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: Àwọn èrò ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́ tí a lè tún ṣe fún gbigba èsì ẹ̀kọ́ tó wúlò láti Bá Ẹni Ìtàn Sọ̀rọ̀ lórí inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Àwọn èrò ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́ tí a lè tún ṣe fún gbigba èsì ẹ̀kọ́ tó wúlò láti Ìrìn-àjò Àkókò lórí inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Àwọn èrò ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́ tí a lè tún ṣe fún gbigba èsì ẹ̀kọ́ tó wúlò láti Adaṣe Viva lórí inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Àwọn èrò ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́ tí a lè tún ṣe fún gbigba èsì ẹ̀kọ́ tó wúlò láti Olùkọ́ Ọ̀rọ̀ lórí inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Àwọn èrò ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́ tí a lè tún ṣe fún gbigba èsì ẹ̀kọ́ tó wúlò láti Olùkọ́ Kíkọ lórí inspir.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: Ìbéèrè labels, pèsè àwọn ìtọ́ni, ṣàyẹ̀wò àwọn ìdáhùn, àti revisit missed parts.
Ìkàwé ìbéèrè
ìbéèrè ìyípo

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: Ìbéèrè patterns fún explanations, tutoring, ere ipa, àwọn quiz, ìdáhùn, ìṣètò, àríyànjiyàn, àti ìrántí aláṣmoṣẹ́.
Ìbéèrè starter

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Ìbéèrè akẹ́kọ̀ọ́'s tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀, inspect tiwọn iṣẹ́, àti escalate àwọn ìtọ́ni gradually.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: Ìbéèrè, let akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ìdáhùn, fún ìdáhùn, àti tún ṣe pẹ̀lú tighter àwọn ààlà.
Awọn ìbéèrè
Àwọn ìbéèrè láti gbìmọ̀ wò
Dáàbò bo ìfọkànsí rẹ pẹ̀lú àwọn ìsinmi tó dára

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Gbangba àlàyé ti ipo àlejò, ìkọ̀kọ̀ chats, crawler ìlànà, akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ààbò, àti school trust.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò fún anyone tó wúlò ibi láti bẹ̀rẹ̀, nígbà tí ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti alábàáṣiṣẹ́ deployments lè adapt experience fún local nílò.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Gbangba guest-mode URLs exist so àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè land tààrà nínú wúlò ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo láti wá, social àwọn ìjápọ̀, schools, àti AI ìdáhùn engines.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Àwọn ojúewé ẹ̀kọ́ gbangba jẹ́ crawlable; àwọn chat ìkọ̀kọ̀ tí a fipamọ́, accounts, irinṣẹ́ admin, àti data olumulo kì í ṣe àyè ìṣàwárí.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ yẹ kí be rọrùn láti ṣàwárí láìsí mímú ìkọ̀kọ̀ chats gbangba.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ipo jẹ́ tuned fún àwọn àlàyé, Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìtọ́ni, ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, àwọn quiz, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ ṣí láti wá àti AI ìrántí crawlers, nígbà tí admin àwọn irinṣẹ́, API àwọn ọ̀nà, reset flows, àti ìkọ̀kọ̀ utilities jẹ́ disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Àwọn ojú-ìwé gbangba fún àwọn kókó-ẹ̀kọ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ chats fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Àwọn ojú-ìwé gbangba show ọja ìhùwàsí, kì í ṣe ìkọ̀kọ̀ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ iṣẹ́.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé, kókó chats, àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́, blog àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti aláṣẹ àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ intended láti jẹ́ rọrùn láti ṣàwárí.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Gbangba kókó URLs let àwọn ìwádìí such gẹ́gẹ́ bí AI olùkọ́ Socratic, AI olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé, AI olùkọ́ kaadi ìrántí, àti talk láti historical figures AI land directly nínú matching ipo.
Àwọn rírà
Èro
Èro: {value1}

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Quality ẹ̀kọ́ yẹ kí ní ìmọ̀lára wà, human, àti alive.
Ìbéèrè
Béèrè lọ́wọ́ ẹni pàtàkì kan
Béèrè lórí ojú-ìwòye ìtàn kan
Ìbéèrè perspective
Ìbéèrè àwòṣe
Àwọn ìbéèrè

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè expose àwọn ìròyìn-fífi-tẹ̀lẹ̀ àti àwọn àlàfo, so akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ builds ìdáhùn dípò ti copying ọ̀kan.
Àwọn ìbéèrè àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ béèrè

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè ń jẹ́ kí o fi àwòṣe tirẹ̀ nípa kókó náà hàn, ibẹ̀ ni ìdàrúdàpọ̀, ìgboyà èké, àti ohun ìpilẹ̀ tó sọnù sábà máa ń hàn.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè gbọdọ̀ ní 4 ìdáhùn options, one ṣe àtúnṣe ìdáhùn, kúkúrú àwọn àlàyé, àti rárá ìdáhùn leakage.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè fi hàn shape ti confusion. akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè mọ̀ formula ṣùgbọ́n kì í ṣe nígbà tí láti lo ó. wọ́n lè rántí historical òtítọ́ ṣùgbọ́n kì í ṣe lóye ìdí. wọ́n lè ní lágbára opinion ṣùgbọ́n aláìlera ẹ̀rí.
Àwọn ìdáhùn yíyára
Quiz kí rereading

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: Quiz kí rereading so àwọn ibi aláìlera di visible.
Quiz kí rereading.
ìdánilẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ìbéèrè
quiz mi lórí eyikeyii kókó

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Ṣe quiz fún mi lórí àwọn kókó yìí, ìbéèrè kan lẹ́ẹ̀kan. Lẹ́yìn ìdáhùn kọọkan, ṣàlàyé àlàfo náà, kí o sì mú ìṣòro pọ̀ síi díẹ̀díẹ̀.
Dán mi wò lórí àwọn ìbéèrè ìmọ̀

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Quiz mi lórí Trivia àwọn ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́
Béèrè ìbéèrè lórí ọ̀rọ̀ tuntun lẹ́ẹ̀kan sí i
Quiz èrò
Ṣe quiz lórí àwọn ibi tó rọ̀
Ṣe quiz fún ara rẹ

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Kọ́kọ́ ṣe quiz fún ara rẹ kí o lè rí ohun tí o rántí gangan àti ibi tí ìgboyà ti ń tan ọ jẹ.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Quizzes sábà ń fi púpọ̀ hàn nítorí wọ́n ń dán ìrántí wò. Kíka léraléra lè ràn wá lọ́wọ́ lẹ́yìn tí quiz bá fi ohun tó nilo àtúnṣe hàn.
Ṣe oṣùwọ̀n ìrántí rẹ ní òtítọ́.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Reached across ọ̀fẹ́ gbangba pẹpẹ àti alábàáṣiṣẹ́ ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ deployments.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Reached àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ across ọ̀fẹ́ pẹpẹ àti àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ alábàáṣmoṣẹ́.
Ka ìwé fún ìṣẹ́jú 20 lójoojúmọ́
Ka ìtọ́sọ́nà àti àtúnyẹ̀wò

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: Ka ìtọ́sọ́nà, lẹ́yìn náà ṣí kọ́ Anything láti gba èdè tó rọrùn àwòṣe ti kókó.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: Ka ìtọ́sọ́nà, lẹ́yìn náà practise here.

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
entries.value: Ka hard text síi ní ti ìṣe
Ka àpilẹ̀kọ
Ka comparison
Ka ìtọ́sọ́nà
Ka àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà
Ka iṣẹ́ àfojúsùn
Ka ọ̀kan ìtọ́sọ́nà

entries.source: Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: Ka one thing, lẹ́yìn náà ṣe tó kàn thing.
Ka ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà
Ka ìránṣẹ́ náà

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: Ka ìdáhùn back àti mark kí sounds unlike ìwọ.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: Ka wọ̀nyí àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà lọ sí adaṣe.
Kàwé, ṣe àkópọ̀, kí o sì béèrè nípa àwọn ọ̀rọ̀
Ka, ṣe àkótán, àti ìbéèrè texts.
Ka, lẹ́yìn náà practise immediately.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Reading AI ìdáhùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe kan náà gẹ́gẹ́ bí ẹ̀kọ́. lẹ́yìn àkọ́kọ́ ìdáhùn, béèrè ipo láti ṣe ìwọ ṣe ohun kan pẹ̀lú èrò.
Alábàáṣiṣẹ́ Ìwé-kíkà

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Kíkà alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Bring passage tàbí book èrò àti kọ́ comprehension nípasẹ̀ summaries, ọ̀rọ̀, inference, àti discussion.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Kíkà alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: Kíkà alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àwọn ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading àwọn akọsilẹ̀ feels productive. Remembering wọn later jẹ́ gidi dánwò.
Kíkà àkókò
Ready láti gbìmọ̀ wò ọ̀kan?

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Ready láti gbìmọ̀ wò àkọ́kọ́ ipo?

entries.source: Ready to try the learning modes?
entries.value: Ready láti gbìmọ̀ wò àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́?

entries.source: Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: Ready láti gbìmọ̀ wò yìí kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ ọ̀nà?
Ìṣètò àkókò tó bá ayé mu
Ìdí nípasẹ̀ hard èrò

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: Ṣe àgbéyẹ̀wò àwọn àwòrán ìbójú, àwọn àwòrán àlàyé, àti àwọn àwòrán iṣẹ́-ilé

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: Ìrántí àkọ́kọ́, ṣe àtúnṣe, reschedule missed items sooner, àti ṣe àkótán tó kàn àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Ìrántí later. yí ibi tí kò lágbára sí kaadi nínú olùkọ́ kaadi ìrántí tàbí short quiz nínú quiz mi lórí Trivia.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Gba ìwé-ìkọjá àkókò, kọjá ìkìlọ̀ ìrìn-àjò, lẹ́yìn náà ṣàwárí àwùjọ ìtàn kan nípasẹ̀ ìran, máàpù, àkókò, àwọn ènìyàn, òfin, ohun-ìní, àti ẹ̀rí.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Recommend ìfọkànsìn preset based lórí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́'s iṣẹ́ àti environment.

entries.value: Recommended inspir citation àti backlink targets

entries.value: Reference àwọn ìjápọ̀, gbangba facts, press àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀, àti citation-friendly details.
Reference àwọn akọsilẹ̀

entries.value: Reference wọ̀nyí àwọn ojú-ìwé nígbà tí kíkọ nípa inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Refine àwọn ìbéèrè, ṣètò ẹ̀rí, dámọ̀ àwọn àlàfo, àti draft outlines.
Ṣàṣàrò lẹ́yìn ìdánwò tí kò dára
Ronú jinlẹ̀ lẹ́yìn ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀
Ṣàṣàrò lórí bí o ṣe ń kọ́ǹkọ́
Ronú jinlẹ̀ lórí báwo ìwọ kọ́.

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Ronú jinlẹ̀ lórí kí blocked progress kí changing ètò.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Ronú jinlẹ̀, reframe, ètò tiny actions, àti celebrate ẹ̀rí ti progress.
Ìdápadà owó
Ṣe àtúnyẹ̀wò ní ohùn rara pẹ̀lú àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Reject unsafe àwọn ìdánwò àti pèsè tó ní ààbò simulations tàbí household-safe alternatives.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Tó jọmọ́ ẹ̀ka àwọn ibùdó ìrànlọ́wọ́ ìwádìí visitors àti àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ rí tó kàn tó wúlò branch láìsí falling back láti gbogbogbò àkọsílẹ̀ archive.
àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà tó jọmọ́

entries.value: Remind, suggest break activities, àti ìrànlọ́wọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ restart cleanly.

Tún aṣìṣe kan ṣe

entries.value: Repair one aláìlera èrò pẹ̀lú àlàyé tàbí worked àpẹẹrẹ.
Tún ibi tó rọ̀ ṣe

entries.value: Rọ́pò passive rereading pẹ̀lú ìrántí, ìdáhùn, àtúnṣe, àti spaced àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. béèrè kí tirẹ ìdáhùn reveals nípa tirẹ understanding.

entries.value: Request ìdáhùn lórí part yẹn felt uncertain.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: O nilo ẹrọ aṣawakiri wẹẹbu tuntun pẹlu JavaScript ti ṣiṣẹ.
Olùrànlọ́wọ́ lórí Ìwádìí

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Olùrànlọ́wọ́ Ìwádìí jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Yí gbooro kókó sí ṣèwádìí àwọn ìbéèrè, wá Àwọn Òfin, outlines, àti source àwọn akọsilẹ̀.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Ṣèwádìí olùrànlọ́wọ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: Ṣèwádìí, source criticism, metacognition, àwọn eto thinking, àti ìpinnu ìtìlẹ́yìn fún sharper judgment.
Tún ọ̀rọ̀ aṣínà ṣe
Reset tirẹ password
ohun èlò sharing
Pípín Ohun-èlò

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond kí asking fún solution.
Tun fíìmù bẹ̀rẹ̀
Bẹ̀rẹ̀ láti ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ nígbà tí ẹ̀kọ́ bá nira
Restart nígbà tí ẹ̀kọ́ feels hard.

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Restate ìṣòro, béèrè fún learner's àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀, tàbí pèsè kéré jù wúlò ìtọ́ni.
Retention ti data
Ìdánwòṣe ìrántí
Adaṣe ìrántí pẹ̀lú AI

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Ìrántí, ìdáhùn, àwọn ìtọ́ni iṣẹ́ ilé, oral adaṣe, àti game-like ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìyípo yẹn ṣe àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ìdáhùn.
Fi àwọn ìdáhùn hàn nígbà tó bá yẹ
Reveal àwọn ìdáhùn nígbà tí ready.
Àtúnyẹ̀wò

Àtúnyẹ̀wò kí ìwọ forget.

entries.value: Ṣàyẹ̀wò iṣẹ́ ìkẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àti àwọn ìgbésẹ̀ tó kàn

Ṣàyẹ̀wò ọ̀sẹ̀ mi

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: Àtúnyẹ̀wò gbangba/ìkọ̀kọ̀ àwọn ààlà sílẹ̀ àwọn ipo àlejò àti saved chats.
Àtúnyẹ̀wò ibi tí kò lágbára later
Ṣàyẹ̀wò àwọn apá tí kò lágbára
Àtúnyẹ̀wò àwọn ibi aláìlera.
Ṣe àtúnyẹ̀wò pẹ̀lú flashcards

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Àtúnyẹ̀wò láìsí looking ní back.
Ṣe àtúnyẹ̀wò kẹ́mísítírì ti àná
Tún draft mi ṣe
Ṣàtúnṣe pẹ̀lú ìdí tó wà lẹ́yìn rẹ̀
Ṣàtúnṣe pẹ̀lú ìdí.
Túnṣe láì pàdánù ohùn tirẹ
àtúnyẹ̀wò ìtọ́sọ́nà
Revision yẹn tests ìrántí
Fún àwọn àṣeyọrí pàtàkì ní èrè

entries.source: Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Rewrite ní ọ̀rọ̀ tirẹ àti béèrè kí improved tàbí weakened.
Robots ìlànà

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots àwọn òfin jẹ́ kí Google, ìlànà wá crawlers, àti major AI discovery crawlers lórí gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé, nígbà tí blocking API àwọn ọ̀nà, admin àwọn ọ̀nà, àti reset flows.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: Roleplay ọ̀kan yí ní àkókò, ṣe àtúnṣe gently, àti fi kún dára síi phrasing.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: Roleplay ọ̀kan yí, fèsì naturally, pause fún ìdáhùn nígbà tí tó wúlò, àti retry.
ere ipa adaṣe AI
Ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ Ìṣeré-ipá

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Àwòrán Ere Ipa jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Adaṣe negotiation, conflict, customer ìtìlẹ́yìn, leadership, tàbí eyikeyii high-stakes ìjíròrò.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario àwọn ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́
Àwọn ọ̀nà láti tẹ̀síwájú ẹ̀kọ́
Ṣe ìgbà ẹgbẹ́ fún ìṣẹ́jú mẹ́ẹ̀dọ́gbọ̀n

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: Ṣiṣẹ́ pẹ̀lú ìlànà ìkẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àjọṣepọ̀ fún àwọn ọ̀rẹ́ tàbí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ẹlẹgbẹ́ pẹ̀lú àwọn ibi-afẹ́de tó wà ní ìbámu, àwọn àyẹ̀wò, àti àwọn ìbéèrè ìjíròrò.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Run Socratic thinking environment ibo akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ discovers ìlóye nípasẹ̀ disciplined questioning dípò passive àlàyé.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Run adaptive lesson canvas ibo akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ acts early àti interface àwọn ìyípadà yí ká tiwọn ẹ̀rí ti understanding.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: Ṣiṣẹ́ àwọn àkókò ìfọkànsí àti ìsinmi tí yóò máa kà bí o ṣe ń lọ láàárín àwọn ìtàkúrọ̀sọ, àwọn taabu, àti àwọn ohun èlò kéékèèké. Ó lè dún láti ẹ̀yìn nígbà tí àkókò bá parí.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Run tàbí ìdí nípasẹ̀ ìyípadà yourself.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Run spaced ìrántí àwọn ìpàdé àti kọ́ àtúnyẹ̀wò schedules.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: Ní ààbò AI ẹ̀kọ́ irinṣẹ́ fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́
Àwọn ìdáàbòbò
Ọ̀rọ̀-ìtumọ̀ SAT

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Save corrected aṣiṣe gẹ́gẹ́ bí checklist tàbí kaadi ìrántí.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Save ìkẹyìn aṣiṣe tàbí insight gẹ́gẹ́ bí ohun èlò àtúnyẹ̀wò.
Fi aṣìṣe náà pamọ́
Save tó kàn àtúnyẹ̀wò ìgbésẹ̀

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved onílo conversations lo ìkọ̀kọ̀ identifiers, jẹ́ kì í ṣe wà nínú nínú sitemap tàbí AI discovery àwọn fáìlì, àti yẹ kí kì í ṣe jẹ́ treated gẹ́gẹ́ bí gbangba source ohun èlò.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Say àfojúsùn nínú ordinary èdè.

entries.source: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Sọ ohun tí o rò pé ó ń ṣẹlẹ̀, ọ̀rẹ́ rẹ yóò sì ṣàyẹ̀wò àwọn èrò tí kò tọ́ pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè rírọrùn.
Ṣètò àkókò fún ìdánwò

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Schedule àwọn quiz àti recall kí rereading so ètò reveals ibi tí kò lágbáras.
Ṣètò ìrántí
Ṣètò àtúnṣe tó kàn

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Schedule tó kàn àtúnsọ nígbà tí fojú kọ jẹ́ síbẹ̀ fresh.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR pathways fún funded ìráyè wọlé
Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti alábàáṣiṣẹ́ ọ̀nà
Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ angle
Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀ àwọn ọ̀nà
Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀ ọ̀nà

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ deployments lè be adapted yí ká custom content, àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, àwọn ìbéèrè, àti NCERT-aligned ẹ̀kọ́ nílò ibo appropriate.
Ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ leaders

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: School rollouts lè jẹ́ planned yí ká akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ privacy, staff oversight, àti wúlò àwọn ààlà àwùjọ ẹ̀kọ́ nílò.
Ìṣàn iṣẹ́ tó jẹ́ ti ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ pàtó
Awọn ile-iwe
Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR
Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR partners
Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti partners

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti partners lè kọ́ láti gbangba ọja toward tó bá a mu, confidential, àti subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè evaluate inspir nípasẹ̀ gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà ṣàwárí tó bá a mu AI ẹ̀kọ́ spaces pẹ̀lú custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, curriculum nílò, àti funded ìráyè wọlé àwọn ọ̀nà.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè evaluate gbangba àwọn ipo àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà discuss tó bá a mu àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, content nílò, àti funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè pèsè ìrírí chat AI white-labelled tí a ṣe fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ wọn, pẹ̀lú àkóónú àti ìṣàn iṣẹ́ tó bá NCERT mu, nípasẹ̀ owó ìlò láti ọ̀dọ̀ ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ alábàápín tàbí ìmúlò CSR.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ nípasẹ̀ trying gbangba àwọn ipo, lẹ́yìn náà lọ toward tó bá a mu ẹ̀dà nígbà tí wọ́n nílò custom àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, content alignment, tàbí funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè dánwò gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò àkọ́kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà lo àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ojú-ìwé láti ṣàwárí tó bá a mu àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, ìkọ̀kọ̀ ìṣètò, NCERT-aligned options, àti funded ìráyè wọlé.
Alabaṣepọ Laabu Imọ-jinlẹ

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Sáyẹ́ǹsì Lab alábàáṣiṣẹ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Ètò tó ní ààbò demonstrations, lóye variables, predict outcomes, àti ìdí láti ẹ̀rí like scientist.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Sáyẹ́ǹsì Lab alábàáṣiṣẹ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Sáyẹ́ǹsì Lab alábàáṣiṣẹ́ àwọn ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́
sáyẹ́ǹsì olùkọ́ AI

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìwádìí rí àwọn ojú-ìwé. àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò sequences. wọ̀nyí àwọn ọ̀nà so pọ̀ gbangba àwọn ipo sí wúlò ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìyípo fún ìlóye, iṣẹ́ ilé, ìdánwò ìmúrasílẹ̀, àti ìṣàwárí.
Ìwádìí intent
Ìwádìí landing àwọn ojú-ìwé

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Ìwádìí àwọn ojú-ìwé, AI àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìdáhùn, àti àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ gbogbo gba kan náà promise: gbangba, tó wúlò, canonical àwọn ẹnu-ọ̀nà yẹn ṣí directly inside ẹ̀kọ́ experience.
